title: Karma Incense Gift Box With Lid
features: This delightful wooden box from the Karma incense range, has a lift off lid with a central glass panel. The interior is divided into six separate compartments for the various incense sticks, a shimmering mirror work elephant holder and cones.
The gift set contains one hundred assorted mini incense sticks of rose, jasmine, sandalwood and lavender fragrances and forty incense cones of vanilla and patchouli.
Measurements: D4 x H13 x W15cm
